message:
feat(mcp): policy-gated wa.get_text/wa.search + semantic/hybrid search modes

Overhaul the MCP wa.get_text and wa.search tools to enforce the policy
engine on read/search operations and to support all three search modes
(lexical, semantic, hybrid) rather than rejecting non-lexical requests.

wa.get_text changes:
- Tool is now constructed with `Arc<Config>` and an optional
  `Arc<PathBuf>` DB path so it can perform policy evaluation.
- The tool is now registered as an AuditedToolHandler when a DB path is
  available (matching wa.search), falling back to a non-audited handler
  when no DB is present.
- Before reading pane text, the handler resolves pane capabilities,
  builds a PolicyInput with domain/title/cwd metadata, and runs the
  policy engine. Denied requests return FT-MCP-0006; approval-required
  requests persist the approval record and return a structured hint.
- Returned text is passed through the policy engine's secret redactor
  (`engine.redact_secrets()`).

wa.search changes:
- Remove the `ensure_mode_supported()` guard that rejected semantic and
  hybrid mode requests. Instead, map the requested UnifiedSearchMode
  into the core `SearchMode` enum and route accordingly.
- For semantic/hybrid modes: embed the query text using HashEmbedder,
  then call `storage.hybrid_search_with_results()` with RRF fusion
  (k=60 constant `MCP_HYBRID_RRF_K`).
- Add full policy evaluation before executing search: resolve pane
  capabilities when a pane filter is specified, build PolicyInput with
  domain context, and enforce deny/approval decisions identically to
  wa.get_text.
- Redact returned snippets and content through `Redactor::new().redact()`.
- Hybrid response envelope now includes `metrics` (fusion parameters,
  semantic latency, cache hit status, budget state) and per-hit
  `semantic_score` and `fusion_rank` fields.

Data model changes:
- McpSearchData gains an optional `metrics: Option<serde_json::Value>`.
- McpSearchHit gains optional `semantic_score` and `fusion_rank` fields.

Internal:
- Remove unused `StorageError` import from mcp module.
- Remove unused `ensure_mode_supported` import.
- Update wa_search_schema_includes_unified_contract_fields test to pass
  `Arc<Config>` to the WaSearchTool constructor.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
